dashboard.label: A2UI Native (React)
dashboard.description: Forensic report emitted as A2UI by the official splunklib.ai agent, rendered as native @splunk/react-ui controls (VerdictBadge, KpiCard, SeverityBar, MITRE table, Recommendations).

html.div: ✦ A2UI → native Splunk React controls — the splunklib.ai agent emits an A2UI v0.9 document (enriched catalog); the renderer maps it to information-first @splunk/react-ui components.
